connectors.label: Codex

connectors.missingReadiness: Controlled dry-run design, non-interactive JSON/auth-quota/timeout/no-UI evidence, and PM acceptance.
connectors.nextAction: Keep codex draft-only until the missing evidence exists and PM/user explicitly revises the machine gate.

connectors.label: Trae
connectors.acceptanceGate: PM confirms executable path and non-interactive args; orchestration:preflight + connector-safety pass
connectors.readinessEvidence: No trae executable resolves via Get-Command; command intentionally stays empty in current scope.
connectors.missingReadiness: Executable intentionally absent in current scope; changing this would require exact executable path, non-interactive args, safety evidence, and PM acceptance.
connectors.nextAction: Keep trae as placeholder/command-empty; do not enable or execute from this lane.

connectors.missingReadiness: Executable intentionally absent in current scope; changing this would require exact executable path, verification surface, safety evidence, and PM acceptance.
